zh.Stoke, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可
zh.Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Tracy於大約1192年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可時，她的父親William de Tracy60歲，母親Hawise Bourne56歲。她和Thomas Durham Alderman至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1250年在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年60歲。

zh-hans.Stoke, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾比曉普斯托可
zh-hans.Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Tracy于大约1192年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾比曉普斯托可时，她的父亲William de Tracy60岁，母亲Hawise Bourne56岁。她和Thomas Durham Alderman至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1250年在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Tracy was born about 1192, in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Tracy, was 60 and her mother, Hawise Bourne, was 56. She had at least 1 son with Thomas Durham Alderman. She died about 1250, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Tracy est née environ 1192, à Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tracy, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Hawise Bourne, avait 56 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thomas Durham Alderman. Elle est décédée environ 1250, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Tracy um 1192 in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tracy 60 und ihre Mutter Hawise Bourne 56. Sie hatte mit Thomas Durham Alderman mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1250 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Tracy è nata il circa 1192 nel Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Tracy, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Hawise Bourne, aveva 56 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Thomas Durham Alderman. Morì circa 1250, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracyが約1192年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクで生まれた時，父William de Tracyは60歳，母Hawise Bourneは56歳であった。彼女はThomas Durham Aldermanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1250年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy(이)가 대략 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tracy(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Bourne(은)는 56세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Durham Alderman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1192–about 1250: tany ho any amin'ny 1192–tany ho any amin'ny 1250

mn.Stoke, Northamptonshire, England: Bishopstoke, Hāmtūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Tracy nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Tracy, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Bourne, tinha 56 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Thomas Durham Alderman. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1250, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Tracy родилась около 1192 г. в местности бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Tracy было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Bourne, 56. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Thomas Durham Alderman. Она умерла около 1250 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.about 1192–about 1250: e tusa o le 1192–e tusa o le 1250

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva de Tracy nació aproximadamente 1192, en Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Tracy, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Hawise Bourne, tenía 56 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Thomas Durham Alderman. Murió aproximadamente 1250, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 60 años.
